research.title: Signals Won 2026 - Except in React. What Fine-Grained Reactivity Actually Means
research.whyTrending: TC39 Signals proposal at Stage 1 with input from Angular, Solid, Vue, Svelte, Preact, Qwik; Svelte 5 runes, SolidJS, Angular 20, Vue 4 all adopted signals while React deliberately bets on the compiler instead. Convergence + controversy + no existing coverage on the blog.
